options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: simulate
commands.description: This can be used to simulate a large number of spins on a roulette wheel and play using various method. Reports will be generated in the output folder.

options.name: output-path
options.description: Path to folder where the results should be written. Default is the current directory. [default: <path>]

options.name: filename-prefix
options.description: Prefix for all the files that are generated when the simulation is executed.

options.name: settings-file-path
options.description: Path to the roulette settings file (JSON) to configure how to play.

options.name: number-of-spins
options.description: Number of spins of the roulette wheel. Default is 10001

options.name: roulette-type
options.description: Sets the roulette type, values include 'American' and 'European', default is American

options.name: enable-csv-output
options.description: Enables output of a .csv file with all the spins.

options.name: enable-number-details
options.description: Details on each individual number (cell) will be written to a file.

options.name: enable-console-logger
options.description: When enabled will log every spin to the console. Enabling this will significantly slow down the play time.

options.name: enable-martingale
options.description: Enables martingale play style simulation.

options.name: enable-bond-martingale
options.description: Enables Bond martingale play style simulation.

options.name: enable-green
options.description: Enables playing on green cells only.

options.name: enable-stop-when-bankrupt
options.description: When enabled the play will end when the bankroll goes to zero.

options.name: initial-bankroll
options.description: The initial bankroll that the player has when starting the simulation. [default: 10000]

options.name: minimum-bet
options.description: Minimum bet on each spin.

options.name: maximum-bet
options.description: Maximum bet on each spin.

options.name: allow-negative-bankroll
options.description: When enabled a negative bankroll will be allowed, otherwise the game will end when the bankroll gets to zero.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enables verbose output.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: config
commands.description: enables you to set config settings that will be persisted in a temp file

options.name: initialBankroll
options.description: initial bankroll (amount of money to play) [default: 3000]

options.name: numSpins
options.description: number of spins [default: 10000]

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enables verbose output.

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information
